meta.title: KiezQuiz · Don't be a Know-it-all. Know it all.
meta.slogan: Don't be a Know-it-all. Know it all.
meta.description: Free map quiz: Learn all boroughs and neighbourhoods of Hamburg (104), Berlin (97), Frankfurt (46) and Düsseldorf (50). With XP, streaks and trivia — mobile & offline.
meta.ogDescription: Don't be a Know-it-all. Know it all. Free map quiz: Learn all boroughs and neighbourhoods of Hamburg (104), Berlin (97), Frankfurt (46) and Düsseldorf (50). With XP, streaks and trivia — mobile & offline.
meta.manifestDescription: Hamburg, Berlin, Frankfurt & Düsseldorf — learn districts through play

map.hintDesktop: 💡 Tip: Drag to pan. Mouse wheel or pinch to zoom.
map.hintTouch: 💡 Tip: One finger to pan, two fingers to zoom. Use +/- buttons.

footer.privacyText: Progress stored locally in your browser. Optional account: data encrypted with Supabase (EU). No tracking cookies.

changelog.title: 📋 What's new?
changelog.intro: Every update and fix since launch — newest first.

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.cloudNotConfigured: Cloud save is not set up yet (local progress only).
settings.cloudLoggedIn: Signed in as {name}. Your progress syncs automatically.
settings.cloudGuest: Not signed in — progress stored locally only. Tap "Sign in" top-right for cloud sync.
settings.privacyBody: Without an account, your progress is stored locally in the browser (localStorage). With an optional account, data is transmitted via TLS and stored with Supabase (EU); passwords are hashed. Details in the privacy policy.
settings.resetBody: Deletes all XP, achievements, and progress{cloudSuffix}. Fresh start as Quiddje.
settings.themeAutoBody: Paper (light) from 7 a.m. to 7 p.m., Ink (dark) otherwise — based on your device clock.
settings.wishAdminBody: View city requests from users and guests.
settings.profileBody: Achievements, friends, and leaderboards for your account.
settings.changelogBody: All updates, new cities, and bug fixes since launch.

adminPage.title: Admin
adminPage.subtitle: Management
adminPage.loginRequiredBody: Sign in with your admin account to view city wishes.
adminPage.deniedBody: This area is only available to admin accounts.
adminPage.noCloudBody: Supabase is not set up — admin data is only available in the live environment.
adminPage.sectionIntro: Overview of all submitted wishes and votes.
adminPage.loadErrorBody: Could not load data. Check the browser console or update the Supabase setup.
adminPage.selectUserHint: Select a user or guest on the left to see their requested cities.
adminPage.activityIntro: How many rounds were played — totals and per player (calendar time Europe/Berlin).
adminPage.activityTimezoneNote: Periods use Europe/Berlin (today from midnight, week from Monday).
adminPage.activityLoadError: Could not load play volume. Run docs/sql/admin-player-activity.sql in Supabase.

profilePage.title: Dashboard
profilePage.metaDescription: Your KiezQuiz player dashboard: pick a city, track progress, friends, and leaderboards.
profilePage.subtitle: Your dashboard
profilePage.settingsIntro: Cloud, privacy, appearance and save data.
profilePage.adminChangelogIntro: All updates, new cities and bugfixes since launch.
profilePage.loginRequiredBody: Sign in to view your profile, friends, and leaderboards.
profilePage.noCloudBody: Supabase is not set up — profile is only available in the live environment.
profilePage.dashboardIntro: Your progress at a glance — pick a city and jump straight back in.
profilePage.dashboardCitiesLead: All playable cities with rank, trophies, and recent rounds.
profilePage.dashboardFriendsLogin: Sign in to add friends and compare your results.
profilePage.achievementsIntro: Global XP rank and per-city progress — expand each city below.
profilePage.noTrophies: No trophies in this city yet.
profilePage.friendsIntro: Find friends by username and compare scores.
profilePage.leaderboardIntro: Best runs per city (higher score, faster time).
profilePage.emptyLeaderboard: No entries for this city yet.
profilePage.emptyFriendsLeaderboard: No friends with an entry for this city.
profilePage.emailChangeHint: You will receive a confirmation link at the new address. Your old address will be notified by email.
profilePage.emailChangePending: Confirmation email sent — please open the link in your new inbox.
profilePage.accountLegal: Your account is subject to the terms of use and privacy policy. Cloud data includes progress, friends and leaderboard entries.
profilePage.deleteBody: Permanently deletes your account and all cloud data.
profilePage.deleteConfirmBody: All saves, friends, and leaderboard entries in the cloud will be removed. This cannot be undone.
profilePage.deleteConfirmCheckbox: I understand that all cloud data will be permanently deleted.
profilePage.deleteFailed: Deletion failed. Please try again later.

friendError.self: You cannot send a request to yourself.

auth.cloudIntro: Optional: With an account your progress is saved across devices. Without signing in you play as a guest (local only).
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.ageLabel: I confirm that I am at least 16 years old.
auth.ageRequired: Please confirm that you are at least 16 years old.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.termsLabel: I accept the terms of use and have read the privacy policy.
auth.termsRequired: Please confirm the terms and privacy policy.
auth.forgotIntro: Enter your username or email. We will send you a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotSuccess: If an account exists, we sent you an email. Please check your spam folder too.
auth.resetIntro: Choose a new password for your account (at least 8 characters).
auth.resetDoneBody: Your password was changed. You can sign in with it right away.

sync.uploaded: ☁️ Local progress uploaded to the cloud.

trivia.defaultStadtteil: A charming Hamburg district with its own distinct character.
trivia.defaultOrtsteil: A Berlin neighbourhood with its own distinct Kiez character.
trivia.defaultCountyMississippi: A county in the state of Mississippi.

Altona: Was historically an independent Danish rival city to Hamburg.
Known for the Elbe beach at Övelgönne and lively Ottensen.
Offers a beautiful view from the Altona balcony over Hamburg's port.
Bergedorf: Hamburg's largest borough by area, shaped by agriculture and the Vierlande.
Home to Bergedorf Castle, the only preserved castle in Hamburg.
Famous Vierlande roses and fresh vegetables for Hamburg grow here.
Eimsbüttel: One of the most densely populated areas with beautiful old buildings.
Known for the Grindel quarter, the historic center of Jewish life in Hamburg.
Home to the famous Hagenbeck Zoo in the Stellingen district.
Hamburg-Mitte: The beating heart of Hamburg with the port, Speicherstadt, city hall, and St. Pauli.
The Elbphilharmonie concert hall stands in modern HafenCity.
Stretches across the Elbe to Wilhelmsburg and Finkenwerder.
Hamburg-Nord: Defined by the huge Hamburg Stadtpark and Hamburg Airport.
Beautiful Alster canals flow through Winterhude and Eppendorf.
Home to the famous Jarrestadt, a legendary brick estate.
Harburg: Lies south of the Norderelbe with a distinct identity of its own.
Known for the wooded Harburger Berge and Schwarze Berge wildlife park.
Home to Hamburg University of Technology (TUHH) and the inland port.
Wandsbek: Hamburg's most populous borough with many green residential areas.
Combines village charm in the Alster valley with urban centers.
Named after the poet Matthias Claudius (Wandsbecker Bote).
Mitte: Berlin's political centre: Reichstag, Museum Island, Alexanderplatz.
Government, culture, and tourism meet here.
Small in area but extremely dense.
Friedrichshain-Kreuzberg: RAW site, East Side Gallery, vibrant nightlife.
High share of young residents and creative industry.
Pankow: Berlin's most populous borough, including Prenzlauer Berg.
Gründerzeit blocks and villa quarters in the north.
Charlottenburg-Wilmersdorf: West Berlin's traditional centre along Ku'damm.
Home to TU Berlin and the trade fair grounds.
Mix of Gründerzeit, post-war modernism, and City West.
Spandau: Westernmost borough with citadel and Havel waterfront.
Steglitz-Zehlendorf: South-west green belt: Wannsee, Grunewald, villas.
Free University of Berlin in Dahlem.
Tempelhof-Schöneberg: Former Tempelhof airport and lively Schöneberg.
Tempelhofer Feld is a huge public park today.
Neukölln: Diverse borough with strong migration heritage.
Britzer Garten and Tempelhofer Feld nearby.
From Reuterkiez to north Neukölln — many micro-neighbourhoods.
Treptow-Köpenick: Largest borough by area: Müggelsee and Köpenick old town.
South-east Berlin — water, forest, single-family homes.
Treptower Park Soviet memorial is iconic.
Marzahn-Hellersdorf: DDR-era plattenbau estates and Gärten der Welt.
Lichtenberg: East Berlin: Tierpark and Stasi memorial.
Mix of plattenbau and detached housing.
Key transport axis to the Berlin ring road.
Reinickendorf: North-west: Tegeler See and airship hangar.
Innenstadt I: Historic centre with Römer, cathedral and Old Town.
Banking district and station quarter shape the skyline.
Smallest district but the densest urban core.
Innenstadt II: Westend with Gründerzeit villas and the trade fair grounds.
Bockenheim is home to Goethe University.
Innenstadt III: Nordend with splendid Art Nouveau buildings.
Popular residential area with cafés and small shops.
Connects the centre with northern neighbourhoods.
Bornheim/Ostend: Lively district east of the centre.
Bornheim known for Berger Straße and weekly market.
Ostend with rising neighbourhoods along Ostendstraße.
Süd: Sachsenhausen south of the Main — apple wine culture and museum embankment.
Niederrad and Oberrad on the Main riverbank.
West: Largest district with Höchst, Griesheim and Schwanheim.
Industrial heritage and Main river location.
Höchst Old Town with Justinus Church — UNESCO World Heritage.
Mitte-West: Rödelheim, Hausen and Praunheim west of the centre.
Good connections to the city centre.
Nord-West: Heddernheim and Niederursel on the Nidda river.
Roman settlement Heddernheim — former Roman town.
Green residential areas in the north-west.
Mitte-Nord: Strong growth in the post-war decades.
Nord-Ost: Many single-family home areas and green spaces.
Ost: Fechenheim, Riederwald and Seckbach on the Main.
Eastern location with Main river proximity.
Kalbach-Riedberg: Youngest neighbourhood on the Riedberg plateau.
Nieder-Erlenbach: Rural charm with orchards and fields.
Harheim: Northernmost neighbourhood at the edge of the Wetterau.
Rural flair with fields and orchards.
Nieder-Eschbach: Quiet residential district in the north-east.
Many single-family homes and green spaces.
Borders Bad Vilbel and the Taunus hills.
Bergen-Enkheim: Easternmost district with vineyards and apple wine.
Altstadt: District 1 — the historic core: Altstadt, Carlstadt, Stadtmitte, Pempelfort, Derendorf and Golzheim.
Königsallee, Rhine promenade and major museums are here.
The smallest but most densely urban heart of the city.
Flingern: District 2 — east of the centre: Flingern Nord, Flingern Süd and Düsseltal.
Known for the Zoopark quarter and lively pub streets.
A traditional workers' quarter with a strong scene.
Unterbilk: District 3 — south of the centre: Unterbilk, Bilk, harbour, Hamm and Flehe.
Media Harbour and the Rhine Towers shape the western skyline.
Popular residential and nightlife area with high density.
Oberkassel: District 4 — the only left-bank district: Oberkassel, Heerdt, Lörick and Niederkassel.
Upscale villas on the Rhine and Nordpark.
Separated from the rest of the city by the river — with its own identity.
Stockum: District 5 — north: Stockum, Lohausen, Kaiserswerth, Wittlaer, Kalkum and Angermund.
Trade fair grounds, airport and Klemensplatz are here.
Lots of green space and formerly rural villages within the city.
Unterrath: District 6 — Lichtenbroich, Unterrath, Rath and Mörsenbroich.
Strong post-war growth — typical residential quarters.
Good links towards the airport and northern neighbours.
Gerresheim: District 7 — east: Gerresheim, Grafenberg, Ludenberg, Hubbelrath and Knittkuhl.
Once an independent town — today with basilica and lively centre.
Hilly location on the edge of the Bergisches Land.
Eller: District 8 — south-east: Eller, Lierenfeld, Vennhausen and Unterbach.
Ellersee and nearby recreation areas attract residents.
A good mix of housing and light industry.
Benrath: District 9 — the large southern district: Benrath, Wersten, Urdenbach and Holthausen.
Benrath Palace and its park are landmarks.
Many detached homes and quiet suburbs on the city edge.
Garath: District 10 — Garath and Hellerhof in the far south.
Large post-war housing estates shape the area.
Strong neighbourhood communities and civic engagement.

specific.St. Pauli: Home to the famous Kiez (neighborhood), the Reeperbahn, and FC St. Pauli. Once a suburb outside Hamburg's city limits.
specific.HafenCity: Europe's largest inner-city development project on the Elbe, home to the Elbphilharmonie.
specific.Blankenese: A former fishing village, world-famous for its idyllic stepped quarter on the steep Elbe shore.
specific.Neuwerk: A North Sea island in the Wadden Sea National Park. Officially part of Hamburg-Mitte since the Cuxhaven Treaty of 1969.
specific.Sternschanze: Hamburg's smallest district, famous for alternative culture, street art, and the lively Schanzenviertel.
specific.Eppendorf: Known for elegant art nouveau villas, fine boutiques, and the University Medical Center Hamburg-Eppendorf (UKE).
specific.Rothenburgsort: Historically a workers' quarter, almost completely destroyed in WWII and now a creative hotspot.
specific.Wilhelmsburg: Europe's largest river island, between the Norder- and Süderelbe, a multicultural and green district.
specific.Finkenwerder: Home to Airbus factories and traditional fruit orchards (Altes Land).
specific.Speicherstadt: The world's largest contiguous warehouse ensemble and a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
specific.Kreuzberg: Famous for Kottbusser Tor, Görlitzer Park, and multicultural street life.
specific.Prenzlauer Berg: Once the scene quarter, now cafés, Altbauten, and Mauerpark flea market.
specific.Mitte: Government quarter, Museum Island, Hackescher Markt — tourist heart of Berlin.
specific.Schöneberg: Schöneberg town hall — where Kennedy said "Ich bin ein Berliner".
specific.Neukölln: From Reuterkiez to Britz — one of the city's most dynamic boroughs.
specific.Köpenick: Famous for the Captain of Köpenick story.
specific.Charlottenburg: Ku'damm, Lietzensee, and Charlottenburg Palace define the west.
specific.Wannsee: Popular lake outing — gateway to Peacock Island.
specific.Teufelsberg: Former US listening station on a rubble hill — now a street-art hotspot.
specific.Mauerpark: Sunday flea market and karaoke on the former border strip.
specific.Alexanderplatz: Berlin's best-known square with TV Tower and transport hub.
specific.Friedrichshain: RAW site, Warschauer Straße, and nightlife along the Spree.
specific.Spandau: Spandau Citadel and picturesque old town on the Havel.
specific.Tempelhof: Legendary airport — today a huge park for Berliners.
specific.Marzahn: Gärten der Welt and typical plattenbau estates in the east.
specific.Lichtenberg: Tierpark and Hohenschönhausen memorial recall DDR history.
specific.Reinickendorf: Tegeler See for swimming — with a view of the airship hangar.
specific.Altstadt: Historic centre with Römer, imperial cathedral and the famous Römerberg square.
specific.Westend-Süd: Banking district and skyline — Frankfurt's landmark high-rise cluster.
specific.Schwabing: Artists' and students' quarter — Münchner Freiheit, pubs, and the English Garden.
specific.Sachsenhausen: Apple wine pubs, museum embankment and the lively Dörfchen quarter.
specific.Höchst: Old town with Justinus Church — part of the UNESCO Limes World Heritage.
specific.Flughafen: Frankfurt Airport — one of Europe's largest airports and a global hub.
specific.Bockenheim: Student quarter with Goethe University and lively Bockenheimer Landstraße.
specific.Bornheim: Popular residential area with Berger Straße, weekly market and cosy cafés.
specific.Nordend: Art Nouveau buildings and the heart of Frankfurt's Nordend.
specific.Gallus: Up-and-coming quarter west of the main station with multicultural flair.

appNews.title: 🌍 More Kiez, more world!
appNews.intro: A lot has happened since your last visit — and we've officially moved to KiezQuiz.de. Four maps, one account, zero boredom.
appNews.feature1Text: Hamburg, Berlin, Frankfurt — plus the brand-new Europe map with 44 countries and capitals.
appNews.feature2Text: Find friends, compare scores, claim the crown. Trophies, personal bests, and bragging rights — all in one place.
appNews.feature3Text: Our new official home — bookmark it, don't lose it. Bonus: the app now speaks English too.
appNews.footerTip: Full details are always in “What's new?” in the footer. Missing your city? Drop a city wish in the hub — we're listening.

log.title: 📋 Log
log.intro: This is how KiezQuiz separates your progress.
log.introGlobalOnly: Your global XP rank applies in every city. City trophies and city rank are in the full game log or on your profile.
log.introCityOnly: City rank and trophies apply only in {city} — each city has its own progress.
log.zoneGlobalNote: XP rank · applies across all cities
log.cityNote: Switch cities to see each city's rank and trophies — your global rank above stays the same.
log.emptyHistory: No games played yet. Start a round!
log.xpHint1: XP: Every hit in any mode gives +25 XP.
log.xpHint2: Streaks unlock XP bonuses: From 10: ×1.2 · from 25: ×1.5 · from 50: ×2 (on the 25 base XP).
log.xpHint3: Boroughs unlock separately via borough progress.

levelUp.title: 🎉 Level up! 🎉
levelUp.body: Your knowledge is growing! Earn XP in any city and mode to keep climbing.

share.levelUpText: I just ranked up in KiezQuiz! Learn Hamburg, Berlin & Frankfurt districts on an interactive map.
share.trophyText: New trophy in KiezQuiz! Learn boroughs and neighbourhoods through play — free, no signup.

hub.title: Which city will you explore?
hub.subtitle: Your global rank & XP apply everywhere — city rank, trophies, and unlocks are per city.
hub.comingSoonHint: This city is in the works — vote below for what should come next.
hub.wishSub: Which city should we build next? Vote or suggest a new one.
hub.wishModalBody: Which city should we build next? Vote — or suggest a new one.
hub.wishCooldown: You already voted for “{city}”. 23-hour cooldown: {remaining} left (from around {nextTime}). You can wish for other cities until then.
hub.wishCooldownShort: You already voted for “{city}”. 23-hour cooldown: {remaining} left. You can wish for other cities until then.
hub.wishAdminBody: All submitted wishes and votes — with account or guest ID.
hub.landingEyebrow: The map quiz for your neighbourhood
hub.landingClaim: Don't be a Know-it-all. Know it all.
hub.landingLeadOutro: Map by map, the unfamiliar becomes home — with XP, streaks and trivia. Free, mobile, offline.
hub.landingLeadStatic: Swipe your way through districts — with XP, streaks and trivia. Free, mobile, offline.
hub.leaderboardLead: Best results per city — accuracy, time and XP. Compare on your profile page with an account.
hub.pvmPurposeTitle: You only truly own a city once you know it.
hub.pvmPurposeBody: We give everyone the knowledge to feel at home in their city — whether they arrived three weeks or thirty years ago. Local knowledge is lived participation.
hub.pvmVisionTitle: The natural way to get to know a city.
hub.pvmVisionBody: KiezQuiz becomes the first reflex for every newcomer and the pride of every local — in every major German city. A generation that truly knows its Kiez.
hub.pvmMissionBody: We make local geography free, mobile and so playful that you don't even notice you're learning. District by district, Kiez by Kiez.
hub.storyBody1: You want to belong, find your bearings and join the conversation.
hub.storyBody2: Maps are dry, tours are expensive, and whatever you Google vanishes instantly.
hub.storyBody3: Free, playful, in your pocket — knows every Kiez.
hub.storyBody4: A few cards each day, a streak, a bit of XP.
hub.storyBody5: You know your city — and finally feel at home.
hub.leaderboardPerk1: Track accuracy and streaks per city
hub.leaderboardPerk2: Global XP and rank — works locally as a guest too
hub.leaderboardPerk3: Sync progress and compare with an account
hub.citiesSectionLead: Pick a city — with progress, trophies and levels as before.
hub.guideLead: How to play KiezQuiz — from picking a city through districts and neighborhoods to XP, streaks and the Sporcle challenge.
hub.guideStep1: Pick a city — Hamburg, Berlin, Frankfurt, Düsseldorf or Europe. Use “Choose your city” at the top or a city card below.
hub.guideStep2: Overview vs. detail — districts (large areas) or neighborhoods (fine-grained). The in-game toggle switches the level.
hub.guideStep3: Explorer mode — freely explore the map, tap places and read short facts. Great for learning without pressure.
hub.guideStep4: Map quiz — one place blinks on the map; pick the matching answer. Hits earn XP and extend your streak.
hub.guideStep5: District detective — you get a name and must find the right area on the map. Zoom and pan are allowed.
hub.guideStep6: Type the name — like the quiz, but you type the answer yourself. Fuzzy matching helps with spelling.
hub.guideStep7: Name all places — Sporcle-style: name as many as you can before time runs out. Districts or neighborhoods per toggle.
hub.guideStep8: Progress & leaderboard — XP, rank and trophies per city. With an account, sync and compare on your profile page.

cityProgress.title: Progress
cityProgress.gateHint: 🔒 Reach 75% in one {singular} to unlock the next.

aboutPage.title: About KiezQuiz
aboutPage.metaDescription: What is KiezQuiz? Who is Kalle the Kiez Pigeon? Everything about the free map quiz for Hamburg, Berlin, Frankfurt and Europe.
aboutPage.heroClaim: Don't be a Know-it-all. Know it all.
aboutPage.whatBody: KiezQuiz is a free map quiz that helps you learn boroughs, neighbourhoods and capitals through play. Click on the map, find places or type names under time pressure — with XP, streaks, trivia and a rank system. No ads, no mandatory account. Works offline as a Progressive Web App.
aboutPage.kalleTitle: Who is Kalle the Kiez Pigeon?
aboutPage.kalleIntro: May I introduce: Kalle, the Kiez Pigeon.
aboutPage.kalleBody1: Every city has them, nobody looks twice: the pigeon. Kalle is at home everywhere, knows every bench, every bakery, every shortcut. The perfect local — and the face of KiezQuiz.
aboutPage.kalleBody2: Behind Kalle is the developer who builds and maintains KiezQuiz. The attitude: Know it already? Come on, I'll show you — never preachy, always curious. Kalle celebrates your streaks, gives trivia tips and is happy when you really know your city.
aboutPage.modesBody: Explorer mode for free discovery, map quiz for clicking, detective for searching, challenge under time pressure and typing mode — something for every learning style.
aboutPage.citiesBody: Currently playable: Hamburg, Berlin, Frankfurt am Main, Düsseldorf and Europe. Missing your city? Drop a city wish in the hub — we're listening.
aboutPage.privacyBody: Without an account, your progress is stored locally in the browser only. With an optional account, email, username and save data are transmitted via TLS and stored with Supabase (EU); passwords are hashed. Full details in the privacy policy.
aboutPage.licensesBody: KiezQuiz uses open-source libraries and free fonts. A full list with licence names and links is at Open source & licences. The application source code itself is not open source.

legalPages.addressMissing: Operator note: add a postal address in src/data/legalConfig.js (required under German law § 5 DDG).

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.metaDescription: Imprint and provider information for KiezQuiz under German DDG and MStV.

sections.title: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act)
paragraphs: {{operator}}

sections.title: Contact
paragraphs:
Email: info@kiezquiz.de
Phone: +49 151 29575097

sections.title: Person Responsible for Editorial Content (§ 18 para. 2 MStV)
paragraphs:
Jeremiah J. Lauer
Schoenaich-Carolath-Str. 1
22607 Hamburg
Germany

sections.title: EU Online Dispute Resolution
paragraphs: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/
Our email address is: info@kiezquiz.de
We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board (§ 36 VSBG).

sections.title: Liability for Content
paragraphs: The contents of this website have been compiled with the utmost care. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages pursuant to § 7 para. 1 DDG and applicable law. According to §§ 8–10 DDG, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity. Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general law remain unaffected. Liability in this regard is, however, only possible from the moment of knowledge of a specific legal violation. Upon notification of such violations, we will remove the content immediately.

sections.title: Liability for Links
paragraphs: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. We therefore cannot accept any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content. At the time of linking, the linked pages were checked for possible legal violations. No illegal content was apparent at the time of linking. Permanent monitoring of the linked pages without specific indications of a legal violation is not reasonable. Upon notification of legal violations, we will remove such links immediately.

sections.title: Copyright
paragraphs: The content and works on this website created by the operator are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, processing, distribution, and any form of commercial exploitation outside the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the operator. The open-source libraries and typefaces used are listed separately on the Licences page (/lizenzen/).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for KiezQuiz: local storage, optional account, Supabase (EU), no tracking cookies.

sections.title: 1. Controller
paragraphs: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:
{{operator}}

sections.title: 2. General
paragraphs: KiezQuiz is a free, ad-free map quiz. We process personal data only to the extent technically necessary to operate the website and provide our services, or to fulfil a contract. We do not use tracking, Google Analytics, or advertising cookies.
This privacy policy applies to kiezquiz.de and the native KiezQuiz app (Capacitor) where the same web logic and backend services are used.

sections.title: 3. Playing Without an Account (localStorage)
paragraphs: If you play without an account, your game progress is stored exclusively in your browser's localStorage. This data remains on your device and is not transmitted to us or any third party.
Legal basis: § 25 para. 2 no. 2 TDDDG (technically necessary local storage, no consent required).

sections.title: 4. Optional User Account
paragraphs: If you register, we process the following data:
list: Email address (for authentication, email confirmation on registration, and password reset)
Username (publicly visible in leaderboards and friend lists)
Password (stored as a cryptographic hash only, never in plain text)
Game progress (JSON format)
Friend list (usernames)
City/district requests (text input)
afterList: Backend provider: Supabase Inc., 970 Toa Payoh North #07-04, Singapore 318992. Data is stored and processed exclusively on servers in the EU West Europe region (Ireland, AWS eu-west-1) and does not leave the European Union.
A data processing agreement pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR is in place with Supabase.
Legal basis: Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR (performance of a usage contract).
Deletion: You can delete your account at any time directly within the app. All your personal data will be removed from our systems upon deletion.

sections.title: 5. City requests & guest ID
paragraphs: When you request a new city or vote on a request, we store the city name and either your user ID (with an account) or a random guest ID in your browser's localStorage. The guest ID is used solely to associate requests and votes without an account and to prevent abuse (cooldown). It is not used for tracking or profiling.

Legal basis: Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in sensible feature planning and fair usage limits). Retention: until the request is processed or deleted by the operator; the guest ID in the browser remains until manually cleared.

sections.title: 6. Game activity log (account holders only)
paragraphs: For logged-in users we record anonymised game metadata (city, mode, score ratio, duration, timestamp) in the player_game_log table to evaluate play volume and stability. Individual answer content is not stored.
Legal basis: Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in operation, error analysis and fair limits). Retention: until account deletion.

sections.title: 7. Transactional email (Resend.com)
paragraphs: For registered users we occasionally send transactional emails (e.g. notice of material changes to the terms of use, password reset via Supabase Auth). Delivery is via Resend Inc., 2261 Market Street #5039, San Francisco, CA 94114, USA.

Data processed: email address, subject and body of the message. A data processing agreement pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR must be in place with Resend. Legal basis: Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR (contract performance) or lit. f (operational security). Retention: at the email provider per their policies; with us until account deletion.

sections.title: 8. Hosting (GitHub Pages)
paragraphs: This website is hosted via GitHub Pages, a service of GitHub Inc., 88 Colin P. Kelly Jr. Street, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA (a subsidiary of Microsoft Corporation).
When you visit our website, access logs (server logs) are automatically recorded, which may include:
list: IP address of the requesting device
Date and time of the request
URL of the page accessed
Browser type and operating system (User-Agent)
Referrer URL (previously visited page)
afterList: These log data are not merged with other data, not used to identify users, and serve solely for technical security and error analysis. They are automatically deleted after a maximum of 30 days.

For transfers of data to the USA, the EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) pursuant to Art. 46 para. 2 lit. c GDPR apply. GitHub has committed to compliance with these clauses (GitHub Data Protection Agreement).
Legal basis: Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in the secure and stable operation of the website).

sections.title: 9. Self-hosted libraries
paragraphs: The Supabase JavaScript library (@supabase/supabase-js) and all fonts are served exclusively from kiezquiz.de (/assets/js/, /assets/fonts/). No requests are made to external CDNs (e.g. jsDelivr or Google Fonts).

sections.title: 10. Developer bot (Telegram, operator only)
paragraphs: For internal development the controller operates an optional Telegram bot on a private server. It processes messages from the operator only (development instructions) and no personal data of KiezQuiz users. End users do not interact with Telegram. No account, save or leaderboard data is transmitted to Telegram.

sections.title: 11. Your Rights as a Data Subject
paragraphs: You have the following rights against us:
list: Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR): information about your stored data.
Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR): correction of inaccurate data.
Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR): deletion of your data. Account deletion is available directly in the app.
Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR).
Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR): receipt of your data in a common, machine-readable format.
Right to object (Art. 21 GDPR): objection to processing based on legitimate interests.

sections.title: 12. Right to Lodge a Complaint
paragraphs: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority. The competent authority for Hamburg is:

Der Hamburgische Beauftragte für Datenschutz und Informationsfreiheit (HmbBfDI)
Ludwig-Erhard-Str. 22, 20459 Hamburg
Email: mailbox@datenschutz.hamburg.de
Web: https://www.datenschutz.hamburg.de

sections.title: 13. Minimum Age
paragraphs: KiezQuiz is not directed at children under the age of 16. Creating a user account requires a minimum age of 16 (Art. 8 GDPR in conjunction with § 1 para. 1 no. 1 DSGVO-AnpUG-EU). We do not knowingly collect personal data from persons under the age of 16. If you become aware that a child under 16 has submitted data to us, please contact info@kiezquiz.de so that we can delete the data without delay.

sections.title: 14. Retention Periods
list: Server logs (GitHub Pages): maximum 30 days
Account data and game activity log: until account deletion by the user
City requests: until processed or manually deleted
Guest ID (localStorage): until manually cleared in the browser
localStorage (game progress without account): until manually cleared in the browser by the user

sections.title: 15. Consent via PIMS
paragraphs: Pursuant to § 26 TDDDG in conjunction with the Consent Ordinance (EinwV), you may grant or withdraw consent to data processing via recognised personal information management systems (PIMS). As we currently do not use any consent-requiring services, no PIMS interaction is required at this time. Should we integrate consent-requiring services in the future, we will support PIMS signals accordingly.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.metaDescription: Terms of use for the optional KiezQuiz account, cloud save, friends and leaderboards.

sections.title: 1. Scope
paragraphs: These terms apply to free use of KiezQuiz at kiezquiz.de. Playing without an account is unaffected. Registration of an optional account is additionally subject to these terms and the privacy policy.

sections.title: 2. Service description
paragraphs: KiezQuiz offers a free, ad-free map quiz for cities and regions. An optional account enables cloud sync, friend lists, friends leaderboards and public leaderboard entries under your chosen username.
We continuously develop KiezQuiz and may change, suspend or discontinue features — without a claim to uninterrupted availability.

sections.title: 3. Registration & account
list: You provide truthful information and choose a username that does not infringe third-party rights or be offensive.
You are at least 16 years old or have parental consent.
You are responsible for keeping your password secret.
One account per person; automated mass registration is prohibited.
You may delete your account anytime in profile settings.

sections.title: 4. Username and Public Content
paragraphs: Your username is publicly visible in leaderboards and friend lists. You must not choose a username that infringes third-party rights or is offensive, discriminatory, or otherwise unlawful. We reserve the right to change or suspend usernames without notice if they violate these requirements. You are solely responsible for your choice of username.
Abusive content can be reported by email to info@kiezquiz.de. We may suspend or delete accounts for abuse (e.g. leaderboard manipulation, harassment via friend requests).

sections.title: 5. Geo data & quiz content
paragraphs: Maps, boundaries and trivia are for learning and entertainment. They may be simplified or outdated and do not replace official sources.
KiezQuiz is provided “as is”; we are not liable for decisions you make based on quiz content.

sections.title: 6. Liability
paragraphs: We are fully liable for intent, gross negligence and injury to life, body or health. For slight negligence we are liable only for breach of essential duties, limited to foreseeable typical damage.
As KiezQuiz is free, liability for data loss is limited to typical recovery effort unless you regularly use your own backups (local or cloud).

sections.title: 7. Copyright & licences
paragraphs: Maps, quiz texts, graphics and software of KiezQuiz are protected by copyright. Use does not grant you ownership of our content.
Your username and public leaderboard entries are user-provided data. You grant us a simple, worldwide, royalty-free licence to display them in the service.
Geo data and maps are based on our own processing of official and open sources. City map data is not loaded live from third-party map servers.
Bundled open-source components and font licences are listed at Open source & licences.

sections.title: 8. No Right of Withdrawal
paragraphs: As KiezQuiz is a free service provided without charge, there is no statutory right of withdrawal under §§ 355 et seq. BGB. This applies regardless of whether an account is created.

sections.title: 9. Availability
paragraphs: We endeavour to keep KiezQuiz available continuously and without disruption but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. Maintenance, updates, or technical issues may cause temporary outages. No claims arise from such interruptions.

sections.title: 10. Changes to Terms
paragraphs: We reserve the right to amend these Terms of Use and the Privacy Policy at any time with effect for the future. We will notify registered users of material changes by email to the address on file and in the "What's New" section of the website. Changes are deemed accepted if you continue using KiezQuiz after receiving the notification and do not object within six weeks. If you object, you may delete your account.

sections.title: 11. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
paragraphs: German law applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. The place of jurisdiction for disputes with merchants, legal entities under public law, or public-law special funds is Hamburg. For consumers, this jurisdiction clause applies only where no mandatory statutory provisions conflict.

sections.title: 12. Contact for Complaints
paragraphs: For questions, complaints, or claims, contact: info@kiezquiz.de

licenses.title: Open source & licences
licenses.metaDescription: Open-source components and licences used by KiezQuiz: Supabase JavaScript client (MIT), fonts (SIL OFL 1.1).
intro: KiezQuiz is a standalone web application. The app source code, maps, quiz texts and graphics are protected by copyright and are not published as open source — unless stated below.
The following open-source components and free fonts are used to run the site. We thank their respective authors.

components.supabase-js: Supabase JavaScript Client — optional account: auth, cloud save, friends, leaderboards (MIT, copyright Supabase Inc., self-hosted at /assets/js/supabase-2.49.8.min.js)
components.bricolage: Display type for headings and brand typography
components.space-mono: Monospace for technical labels and codes
components.http-server: Local dev server for developers (npm run dev)

sections.title: Own software
paragraphs: Quiz logic, maps, geo data processing, UI and mascot graphics of KiezQuiz are proprietary copyrighted work of Jeremiah J. Lauer. All rights reserved.
Interface icons are custom inline SVGs. System emojis (Unicode) have no separate licence.

sections.title: Dependencies of @supabase/supabase-js
paragraphs: The Supabase client package includes further npm dependencies (mostly MIT, e.g. auth, realtime and storage modules). Details: GitHub repository & LICENSE and npm dependency list.

sections.title: Geo data
paragraphs: Administrative boundaries and map layers are based on our own processing of the following sources. Trivia texts are written by us and protected by copyright.
list: Hamburg, Berlin, Frankfurt am Main, Düsseldorf — GeoJSON from Click That Hood (Code for Germany), derived from OpenStreetMap (© OpenStreetMap contributors, ODbL 1.0). Population and area data supplemented from Wikipedia.
Munich — district boundaries from the City of Munich open data portal (© City of Munich, Data Licence Germany – Attribution – Version 2.0).
Europe — country boundaries from Natural Earth (ne_50m_admin_0_countries, public domain).
Mississippi (counties) — county boundaries from US Census Bureau TIGER/Line (via Plotly datasets, public domain).

sections.title: Font licences (OFL)
list: Bricolage Grotesque, Hanken Grotesk and Space Mono are under the SIL Open Font License 1.1.
Font files are served from /assets/fonts/ on kiezquiz.de only.
Full licence text: OFL.txt

sections.title: Contact
paragraphs: Licence or usage questions: info@kiezquiz.de

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.metaDescription: Accessibility statement for KiezQuiz under the BFSG: status, known limitations and feedback contact.

sections.title: Statement date
paragraphs: This accessibility statement applies to kiezquiz.de (as of 10 June 2026). It was prepared on the basis of a self-assessment.

sections.title: Conformance status
paragraphs: KiezQuiz is an interactive map quiz with SVG maps, touch and keyboard controls. The website does not yet fully meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA. We are working on improvements step by step.

sections.title: Known limitations
list: The interactive map is primarily visual and mouse/touch driven; not all map features are fully accessible via keyboard and screen reader.
Some modals and dynamic game states still have incomplete ARIA labelling.
Contrast and focus indicators are being reviewed but are not yet consistently at AA level.

sections.title: Feedback & contact
paragraphs: If you encounter barriers using KiezQuiz or wish to send feedback, email: info@kiezquiz.de. We aim to respond within four weeks.
Enforcement body in Hamburg: Landesbetrieb Verkehr (LBV) — mediation under the BFSG.

sections.title: Technical basis
paragraphs: The site uses semantic HTML, responsive layouts and partial ARIA attributes. Legal texts are also available without JavaScript (static fallback).
